scenario.context: Station 07 of the day run: present the software solution.
scenario.mission: You structure the customer presentation, show the core benefit, and answer follow-up questions with professional confidence.

station.profile: Presentation structure, customer benefit, follow-up questions
constraints: Make core benefit and limits transparent

customerRequest.subject: Station 07: Customer presentation
customerRequest.body: Please present the current solution state in a way that fits the audience and prepare a structured question phase.

questions.title: Set the presentation focus
questions.prompt: What should come first at the beginning of a customer presentation?

options.rationale: Difficult starting point for the business side.

options.text: Project goal, initial situation, and expected benefit
options.rationale: Creates orientation for all target groups.

feedback.correct: Correct: The target picture and benefit create the right opening.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: The opening has to communicate context and benefit.

questions.title: Core benefit and limits
questions.prompt: Which contents belong in a robust solution presentation? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Core benefit for the business process
State limits and open residual items transparently
Show next steps for operations or further expansion

feedback.correct: Correct: The presentation is transparent and goal-oriented.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please connect benefit, limits, and next steps more clearly.

questions.title: Flow of the customer presentation
questions.prompt: Put the flow of a structured presentation in order.
items: Present the target picture and initial situation
Introduce the solution and demo flow
correctOrder: Present the target picture and initial situation
Introduce the solution and demo flow

feedback.correct: Correct: The flow is clear and audience-appropriate.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please move from target picture via demo to alignment.

questions.title: Calculate presentation time
questions.prompt: Planned: 12 minutes of context, 15 minutes of demo, 8 minutes of questions. How long is the entire slot?

feedback.wrong: Please add all time slots correctly.

questions.title: Formulate the presentation close
questions.prompt: Formulate a closing section in 4-6 sentences with core benefit, open point, and next step.
questions.expectedOutline: Audience-appropriate close with benefit, residual item, and binding follow-up action.

feedback.correct: Correct: The close is clear and suitable for the customer.
feedback.wrong: Please work out the core benefit, open point, and next step more concretely.
